utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each item is fully specified: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with monthly and annual costs for two options; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services includes enhancement services with costs; total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, including before and after discount values. All details requested in the format appear to be fully covered.
